headline: PulteGroup: Housing Bill Helps, But Doesn't Solve Affordability Issues
summary: PulteGroup, Inc. jumped 7% after the House passed a housing affordability bill. Click for this updated look at PHM stock and see if it is right for you.

headline: Meritage Homes and PulteGroup Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after both chambers of Congress passed the bipartisan 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act.
